mode: REDUCED-UNIVERSE (300-sym sanity main subset) — quant-justified: breadth-thrust is a market-DAY event (fires same day for all symbols) => high-firing gate (full-universe OOM risk), and a 300-sym subset gives a faithful distinct-firing-DATE count, which is exactly what the Step-0 cadence read needs.
premise: Isolate the GENUINELY FRESH part of BTC+Tyr — the breadth-thrust/transition GATE (dip-then-surge: market breadth dipped <= {{low}} within the last {{window}} trading days AND today thrust >= {{high}}) — decoupled from the order-block TRIGGER (a deprecated breakout-family cousin that already earned NO PROCEED solo). The whole bet is the gate; if it carries no standalone forward-return lift it's not a candidate. Sibling of Gjallarhorn's breadth-WASHOUT bottom-timer (this is the CONTINUATION half; screened so as not to double-count the breadth read).
step0_gate: Cadence/lottery kill-switch read FIRST from firing.byYear + distinct firing dates: PASS = >=1-2 distinct firing dates/yr spread across a MAJORITY of years; FAIL (do NOT build first-class condition) = <~1 date/yr OR clustered in 2003/2009/2020 only (Gjallarhorn cadence-ceiling redux), OR thrust degenerates to a thin-only level gate (only near-level sweep cells low=35/high=50 carry the firing).
quant: quant-analyst spec 2026-06-08 (agent a3b5396f2c9d939ec): PROCEED as gate-isolation screen, BUILD-NEW inline script, internal-breadth-thrust primary (RSP/SPY deferred — full Block-A span), ADX screened SEPARATELY later (wiring now = IS-fitting from breakout's own data).
authored_via: /create-condition — efficient O(1) getMarketBreadth point-lookup pattern (not the full filterKeys+toSortedMap scan) to respect P-rules + de-risk the documented breadth perf cliff; strictly anti-lookahead (today=quote.date PIT-correct, dip strictly prior); expression form (no return in lambda body).
status: PENDING-APPROVAL — not yet fired; awaiting operator go before /condition-screen runs.

step0_cadence: PASS — 199 distinct firing dates/21yr (~9.5/yr), 15/21 years. NOT a cadence-ceiling. But firing 62% concentrated in 2009-2014 (post-GFC recovery tape).
summary: Three independent binding failures: (1) SPY-REGIME SIGN-FLIP at all 3 horizons (5d down -1.62%/n=590, 10d flat -0.11%, 20d up -0.23%) — same failure that killed solo-Tyr, here worse + incoherent; a continuation signal must hold sign, this is regime-determined noise. Gate fires 6.98% in up-tape vs 0.17% in down-tape => measures 'market already recovered', not the transition INTO recovery. (2) NO detectable forward-return edge: 5d meanLift +0.249% t=1.23 (sub-threshold) + hitRateLift goes NEGATIVE at 10d (-1.47pp) and 20d (-0.86pp); horizon shape DECAYS (wrong for deploy-and-ride). (3) The 'thrust' is a LEVEL GATE not a transition detector: all lift lives in the loosest near-level cell high=50 (5d+0.38/10d+0.41/20d+0.44), collapses to ~0/neg at high=60; firing un-holdable across grid (per-step support moves +46/+47/-52% rel) => ARS firing-stability inconclusive-by-construction, level-gate degeneration is the real tell (thinning-not-selecting). Fill gap eats ~32% of the lone 5d positive (meanGap +0.080%, posRate 0.49). Lottery-vs-signature: aggregate (already weak) lift is a 2009-2014 one-tape artifact.
candidate_impact: KILLS BTC+Tyr. The entity's whole bet was the breadth-thrust GATE (fresh part); the order-block TRIGGER is a deprecated breakout-family cousin already weak in isolation (order-block-breakout-condition). Fresh component fails in isolation => nothing left to wire.
disposition: NOT a firewall death — no config_hash burned, G13 cross-candidate brake NOT engaged. Premise CLASS free to be re-scoped, but this specific gate is rejected. Do NOT iterate by tuning window/low/high (no robust corner) or bolting on a SPY-regime gate (= IS-fitting the sign-flip that condemns it). Any breadth-event successor needs a STRUCTURALLY DIFFERENT transition predicate (true multi-day thrust/slope, regime-sign-consistent), screened from scratch AND screened-together-with-Gjallarhorn to avoid double-counting.
obligations_unmet: Screened the gate ALONE — the entity's screen-together-with-Gjallarhorn / don't-double-count obligation was not exercised (moot given the reject).
